contents: For plastic particles in the 100 micron, or 0.10 millimeter size range, tests conducted for Orb at the State University of New York revealed a global average of 10.4 plastic particles per liter. These particles were confirmed as plastic using an industry standard infrared microscope 原文意思应该是每升样本含有10.4个塑料颗粒 而不是10.4克
